problem.title: ISC-LOAM on the second public HDL-400 reference window
problem.question: How does ISC-LOAM perform on the second public HDL-400 reference window?

dataset.reference_role: public reference trajectory sliced from the HDL-400 pose trace export

variants.label: Fast
variants.intent: Reduce input density, keyframe rate, and loop-closure frequency for faster scan-context SLAM updates.

variants.label: Dense
variants.intent: Increase input density and revisit keyframes more aggressively with tighter loop-closure cadence.
